title: ursinia radicans
intro: Ursinia radicans, also known as the rock daisy or common ursinia, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African and European herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ursinia radicans include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and even support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ursinia radicans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care and wound healing.
